disclaimer.sw: AfyaAI haibadilishi daktari. Daima fuata ushauri wa mhudumu wa afya.
disclaimer.en: AfyaAI does not replace a doctor. Always follow healthcare advice.

rationale.sw: Mtoto chini ya miaka 5 na homa ya zaidi ya siku 3 anaweza kuwa na malaria, pneumonia, au ugonjwa mwingine hatari. Vipimo vya haraka vinahitajika.
rationale.en: A child under 5 with fever >3 days may have malaria, pneumonia, or other serious infection. Immediate testing required.

rationale.sw: Kutokwa damu wakati wa ujauzito kunaweza kuwa ni dalili ya hatari kwa mama na mtoto. Msaada wa haraka unahitajika.
rationale.en: Bleeding during pregnancy can be dangerous for mother and baby. Urgent medical attention required.

rationale.sw: Maumivu makali wakati wa ujauzito yanaweza kuonyesha matatizo hatari. Angalia mhudumu wa afya haraka.
rationale.en: Severe pain during pregnancy may indicate serious complications. See healthcare provider immediately.

rationale.sw: Shida kubwa ya kupumua inaweza kuwa ni dalili ya pneumonia, asthma kali, au tatizo la moyo. Dharura.
rationale.en: Severe breathing difficulty may indicate pneumonia, severe asthma, or heart problem. Emergency.

rationale.sw: Kupoteza fahamu ni dalili ya hatari sana. Piga 112 mara moja.
rationale.en: Loss of consciousness is very serious. Call 112 immediately.

rationale.sw: Kutokwa damu nyingi kunaweza kusababisha upotevu wa damu hatari. Nenda hospitali haraka.
rationale.en: Heavy bleeding can cause dangerous blood loss. Go to hospital immediately.

rationale.sw: Homa ya siku 2-3 inahitaji kuangaliwa na mhudumu wa afya. Inaweza kuwa malaria au ugonjwa mwingine.
rationale.en: Fever for 2-3 days needs medical evaluation. Could be malaria or other infection.

rationale.sw: Maumivu makali yanahitaji kuangaliwa na daktari kubaini sababu na matibabu sahihi.
rationale.en: Severe pain needs medical assessment to determine cause and appropriate treatment.

rationale.sw: Kuhara na udhaifu kunaweza kuonyesha upotevu wa maji na umeme mwilini. Angalia daktari.
rationale.en: Diarrhea with weakness may indicate dehydration and electrolyte imbalance. See doctor.

rationale.sw: Dalili za upole za siku chache zinaweza kuwa za kawaida. Pumzika, kunywa maji, na fuatilia.
rationale.en: Mild symptoms for a few days may be normal. Rest, hydrate, and monitor.

message.sw: Pumzika, kunywa maji mengi, fuatilia dalili. Tembelea kituo kama haziendi.
message.en: Rest, drink plenty of fluids, monitor symptoms. Visit facility if they don't improve.

sw: Kunywa maji mengi (angalau lita 2 kwa siku)
Kula vyakula vya kuunga mkono afya
Tembelea daktari kama dalili zinazidi au haziendi
en: Drink plenty of water (at least 2 liters per day)
Visit doctor if symptoms worsen or don't improve

message.sw: Tafadhali tembelea kituo cha afya ndani ya siku 1-2.
message.en: Please visit a health clinic within 1-2 days.

sw: Panga miadi kwenye kituo cha afya kilicho karibu
Eleza dalili zote kwa mhudumu wa afya
en: Book appointment at nearest health facility
Explain all symptoms to healthcare provider

message.sw: Nenda kituo cha afya au hospitali haraka (ndani ya masaa machache).
message.en: Go to health facility or hospital soon (within a few hours).

sw: Onyesha nambari ya rufaa kwa mhudumu wa afya
Eleza dalili zote na historia yako ya afya
en: Show referral code to healthcare provider
Explain all symptoms and medical history

message.sw: Hii ni dharura. Piga 112 au nenda hospitali SASA.
message.en: This is an emergency. Call 112 or go to hospital NOW.

sw: Piga 112 SASA kwa gari la wagonjwa
Au nenda hospitali ya karibu haraka
Onyesha nambari ya rufaa kwa daktari
en: Or go to nearest hospital immediately

address.sw: United Nations Road, Upanga, Dar es Salaam
address.en: United Nations Road, Upanga, Dar es Salaam
